transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hello, this is Alex from DemoCompany, calling about your DemoLender loan. We reviewed your account and have a good offer to help close it. Can we talk for a moment?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Am I speaking with Arjun Nair?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Bullish. Hello? We have disconnected with the institution. We are not we are not happy with the services they have done.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I understand. Before we go further, can I confirm I am speaking with Arjun Nair?

transcript.text: So yeah, admission captured. Admissions were canceled, and we have took an admission in some other institution.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I understand. Just to confirm before we proceed — am I speaking with Arjun Nair?

transcript.text: Yes. And I told clearly we paid the already amount and

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I understand, Arjun. You're saying the amount has already been paid. Can you tell me when you made the payment and roughly how much it was?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: rest of the balance amount to be canceled.

transcript.text: Got it. How much did you pay, and do you have a reference number or UTR from that payment?

transcript.text: I understand, Arjun. To help resolve this, I need the UTR or reference number from your payment. Do you have that handy?

transcript.text: Yes. No. Why why do I have to pay? They disconnected with the institution.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I understand, Arjun. You're saying the institute stopped services, and you feel the remaining amount should not be yours to pay. I hear you. Do you have any proof of the payment you already made — a UTR number or bank receipt?

transcript.text: Yeah. You can please share a message. I will try to

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sure, you can send your payment proof to support@demolender.com. Once you do that, our verification team will review it and follow up with you.
